# @peekview/mcp-server

> MCP bridge for PeekView. Streamable HTTP transport, dual mode (local/remote), multi-user auth.

Connect PeekView to Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, or any MCP client. Agents call tools to publish output — no human running a command, no copy-paste. Local mode reads files directly from disk (bypasses LLM context). Remote mode accepts file content over MCP.

## Setup

- [MCP Server README](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/README.md): Install, configure, run, connect to clients

## Tools

- [Tool reference](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/README.md): publish_files (local), create_entry (remote), get_entry, list_entries, delete_entry — parameters, return values, usage notes

## Modes

- [Dual mode](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/README.md): Local (direct file read, Agent passes paths) vs Remote (Agent sends content over MCP), when to use each

## Configuration

- [Config reference](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/README.md): Environment variables, config file, allowed_paths, trust_all_paths, PeekView URL, API key

## Client Setup

- [Claude Code](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/README.md): claude mcp add command with Streamable HTTP transport
- [Cursor / OpenCode / other MCP clients](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/README.md): JSON config with URL and headers

## Security

- [Security model](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/packages/mcp-server/README.md): Path allowlist, symlink handling, denylist for sensitive files, API key auth

## Deploy

- [Agent deployment guide](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/docs/guides/agent-deployment-guide.md): VPS deployment, systemd, Docker, reverse proxy for PeekView + MCP Server

## Optional

- [PeekView README](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/README.md): Backend service quick start, rendering capabilities
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/randomgitsrc/peekview/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history
